title.en: The Blue Fish Domain Ancestor had also been the...

content.en:
The Blue Fish Domain Ancestor had also been the First Holy Son in the Battle Gate for a long time, and had stayed at the Supreme Domain Ancestor level for a long time.

In fact, with the talent and potential of the herring fish domain ancestor, if he wanted to impact the invincible domain ancestor realm, he would have succeeded in the impact a long time ago.

Once the Blue Fish Domain Ancestor stepped into the Invincible Domain Ancestor realm, it would be an existence comparable to the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor, and it would definitely be one of the high-level leaders of the Battle Gate.

But so far, the herring fish domain ancestor has not broken through, and many domain ancestors don't know the reason.

It stands to reason that the Ancestor of the Blue Fish Domain should have cultivated the domain body and domain power to an extremely pure status, and the soul has also reached the level of soul holy light, so why not choose to break through?

Ye Tian had not stepped into the Supreme Domain Ancestor level, so many secrets were not necessarily known, so he would not feel strange.

He felt that so many Supreme Domain Ancestors had been staying at the Supreme Domain Ancestor level, there must be a reason for staying, and he would not deliberately waste time.

Although Ye Tian is now the First Holy Son, his strength and status are far inferior to the Qingyu Domain Ancestor.

Therefore, the Ancestor of the Blue Fish Domain is here, and he must go and see it.

"Then let's go and see you!"

Ye Tiandao.

Soon, under the guidance of the True Spirit Domain Ancestor, Ye Tian came to a certain continent in the Xuanxu Saint Realm and saw a woman wearing a cyan battle suit, this woman was also the so-called Blue Fish Domain Ancestor.

"I've seen the herring fish domain ancestor!"

Ye Tian said politely.

When greeting, Ye Tian also noticed the dozens of Supreme Domain Ancestors beside the Blue Fish Domain Ancestor.

These Supreme Domain Ancestors are all under the command of the Herring Fish Domain Ancestor, and all of them are women, not members of the Battle Gate, but just the personal guards of the Herring Fish Domain Ancestor.

But these Supreme Domain Ancestors are not weak, they are all geniuses selected by the Blue Fish Domain Ancestor in various places in the Dark Sacred Domain, and they are all willing to follow the Blue Fish Domain Ancestor, and under the cultivation of the Blue Fish Domain Ancestor, they have grown up one by one.

Now, these dozens of Supreme Domain Ancestors are all very powerful, and they have all reached the combat power of the top Supreme Domain Ancestors, and a few of them even have the combat power of the third-grade Supreme Domain Ancestors, which is not weaker than some so-called Holy Land Holy Sons.

Having so many Supreme Domain Ancestors is also a matter of full face!

"Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son, I want to cultivate in the Xuanxu Holy Realm for a while, don't you mind?"

The Blue Fish Domain Ancestor said with a smile.

"Naturally, I don't mind!"

Ye Tian said.

In the following chat, Ye Tian felt that the Qingyu Domain Ancestor was easier to talk and had a very gentle temperament.

Of course, Ye Tian did not relax because of this.

I have to say that his current strength is far inferior to the Qingyu Domain Ancestor, so the appearance of the Qingyu Domain Ancestor here is not a good thing for him.

Even if Ye Tian used the power of the Xuanxu Saint Realm with all his might, he might not be able to defeat the Blue Fish Domain Ancestor.

In the days that followed, a number of big people from the Dark Sanctuary arrived, each of whom was not much weaker than the ancestor of the Blue Fish Domain.

And the light-clothed saintess also came, Ye Tian knew the news, but he didn't go to see the light-clothed saintess, after all, the relationship between the two is relatively average, and they are not friends.

At this time.

Ye Tian was cultivating with all his might, striving to refine his body strength and body to an extremely pure place as soon as possible, and then refine his soul to an extremely high level.

In that case, he would go to the Supreme Domain Ancestor Realm.

Once he was promoted to the Supreme Domain Ancestor Realm, he could sweep everything.

Because of the Endless Domain Law, Ye Tian's cultivation speed is very fast, and his domain power and domain body are becoming more and more refined day by day, while his soul can be cultivated and refined in the Soul Saint Realm, so his progress is not slow.

But even now, if you want to cultivate to the extreme of the top domain ancestor, it will take a long time.

Unless you use some treasures that can quickly refine the domain body and domain power, you can accelerate your cultivation and quickly rise to the extreme of the top domain ancestor, but that kind of treasure is not in Ye Tian's hands.

There may be a battle gate, but such a treasure must be very precious, and he does not have the right chips in his hands.

He wouldn't trade things that were really useful to him, and ordinary things couldn't be exchanged for such treasures.

However, Ye Tian still went to the battle gate to learn about the treasures of the Pure Domain Body and the Domain Power.

Eventually, he learned that there were three kinds of treasures in the Dark Sanctuary that worked very well for him and could be quickly refined and refined.

One is the Pure Holy Fruit, which can purify all the power in the body in a short period of time, but the value is very high, and a Pure Holy Fruit is even three points more precious than the holy relics on the holy relics list, because the Pure Holy Fruit is useful to the Supreme Domain Ancestor, and it is undoubtedly a waste to use it for the top Domain Ancestor.

The second is the Pure Pill, which is a kind of elixir.

The alchemy system of the Dark Sanctuary is also very developed, with many pills that are of great help to the ancestors of the domain, and the materials are basically holy medicines, with holy pills as the main materials, and the refined pills often have magical effects.

There are even powerful alchemists, who can also use certain plant-based forbidden treasures as materials to refine pills, and the effect is also very good.

And the Innocent Pill is a magical pill that contains a variety of holy medicines, and even contains an ancestral medicine, so as to refine it, but this kind of pill is in the hands of the Forbidden Holy Gate, and there is no Innocent Pill in the Battle Gate.

The third is a holy relic, the jade bottle, which is the unique holy relic of the Holy Maiden's Gate, and there is more than one.

Most of the relics have only one relic, but some have multiple relic.

The jade net bottle is a holy relic condensed in the jade net world, the jade net world is a holy world under the command of the holy maiden, this holy world is very peculiar, a jade net bottle can be born in a long time, this kind of holy object is not of high grade, can not be ranked on the holy list, but the effect is very good, can be pure power.

Because of this, the Domain Ancestors of the Holy Maiden Gate have progressed very quickly.

"There is no one of the three treasure battle gates, although the battle gate also has some treasures that assist pure power, but the effect is relatively slow, and it does not meet my requirements!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

The Pure Holy Fruit is almost a legend, and Ye Tian has completely given up.

As for the Innocent Pill, the materials were relatively rare, and he didn't know anyone from the Forbidden Holy Gate.

This time, the domain ancestor who arrived at the Forbidden Holy Gate was not a high-level person, and it was impossible to have the Innocent Pill in his hands.

It was the jade net bottle, Ye Tian felt that there was still some hope, because the light-clothed saint girl might have a jade net bottle in her hand.

After all, the light-clothed saint has a high status, she is a holy endower, and her parents gave her a jade pure bottle to assist in cultivation, which is very normal.

"It's better to go to the lightly-clothed saintess and ask, if she really has a jade bottle in her hand, see if she can use it for a period of time at some cost!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.
